question.label: Tooling friction
question.name: What part of your workflow is slowing you down most right now?
question.description: Surfaces process or tooling friction that may be masquerading as confidence issues.

answer: If we define what good looks like for my next two tickets, I will feel much steadier.

assessment.note: Names a specific missing condition — a defined quality bar for the next two tickets — which is a strong clarity gap and blocked growth signal.

new_queue.label: Next-step focus
new_queue.name: Given what we've covered, what would you want to tighten up first?

history.answer_excerpt: I can do the tasks, but I still second-guess whether my approach matches team expectations.
When feedback is specific and fast, I move much quicker.
I still feel fuzzy on where quality bars differ between quick fixes and core flows.
